Video.summary: A Pekingese who refuses to eat or drink; a Chihuahua who bites people; two chow mixes who share a home but won't play nice with each other.
Video.title: Blood Brothers

Video.summary: A woman who has relinquished the role of pack leader to her Welsh Sealyham terrier; an English mastiff with too much energy; a Tibetan terrier who is a terror on walks.
Video.title: Mastiff Mayhem

Video.summary: A great Dane bites her owner; a bearded collie with dog aggression; a mouthy French mastiff.
Video.title: Cesar Down Under

Video.summary: Two German shepherds who get along fine at home, but are at each other's throats when at daycare; a miniature schnauzer that barks when her owner's grandchildren visit.
Video.title: Mission: Control

Video.summary: Cesar adopts four puppies and films them living with him and his pack for their first eight months to demonstrate how to raise a balanced dog.
Video.title: How to Raise the Perfect Dog

Image.alt: How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog

Video.summary: An aggressive lab-mastiff mix; a Jack Russell mix that barks obsessively; a woman is concerned at her dog's habit of barking and growling at people.
Video.title: Attacking Cujo

Video.summary: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.
Video.title: Most Aggressive Breeds

Video.summary: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.
Video.title: Family Feud

Video.summary: Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.
Video.title: Wild Things

Video.summary: A woman's French bulldog exhibits people aggression that started for no apparent reason when he turned two years old.
Video.title: Hardy: Attacked With Love

Video.summary: Life coach and fitness trainer Jillian Michaels can whip contestants on the "Biggest Loser" television series into shape, but she's at a loss when it comes to her dog; escape artist dog; dog dislikes brooms and windshield wipers.
Video.title: The Hairy Houdini

Video.summary: A Great Dane with an aggressive attitude; Cesar helps a shepherd mix recover from the issues developed while living in a hoarding situation so she can be rehomed.
Video.title: Healing the Hoarded

Video.summary: A Weimaraner is aggressive towards anyone who turns on one of the motorized bikes used to deliver the mail; an aggressive shar-pei; an Australian red cattle dog who barks incessantly.
Video.title: Cesar in Oz

Video.summary: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.
Video.title: Born to Be Wild

Video.summary: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.
Video.title: Expecting Trouble

Video.summary: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German Shepherd who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.
Video.title: Spike in the Heart

Video.summary: Cesar helps a pregnant Ashlee Simpson-Wentz's English bulldog with his aggression issues before the baby arrives; a retriever with food aggression.
Video.title: Pop Star Fallout

Video.summary: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.
Video.title: Secrets and Lies

Video.summary: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.
Video.title: The Evil Queen

Video.summary: A vicious Chihuahua frightens the pit bulls at the rescue center where he lives.
Video.title: Chihuahuas From Hell

Video.summary: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.
Video.title: Night Terrors

Video.summary: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.
Video.title: Cesar Goes to Vegas

Video.summary: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.
Video.title: Terrible Tobi

Video.summary: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/shar pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.
Video.title: Nail in the Coughin
